response.original_title: How to Dispute an Uphold Transaction? – Dispute Resolution
response.overview: To dispute a transaction on Uphold, first, log into your account and visit the Support section. 🌐 +1-833 » 644 » 5290 You'll need to submit a dispute request, 🌐 +1-833 » 644 » 5290 providing details of the transaction and the reason for your dispute. Uphold’s team will review your claim, 🌐 +1-833 » 644 » 5290 and they may request additional information to resolve the issue. 🌐 +1-833 » 644 » 5290 It's essential to provide accurate and clear details to ensure a smoother dispute process.  For quicker assistance, you can contact Uphold's support team directly by calling 🌐 +1-833 » 644 » 5290 or ✔️ 1⚝(888)⚝(574)⚝(7167). Their customer service will help you understand the dispute resolution process and guide you through the next steps based on your situation.
